name: X760 + H-Flow + S30 + RTK

payloads.name: S30
payloads.purpose: mission payload affecting mass and center of gravity

tuning_goal: stable payload flight with RTK-aware position diagnosis and conservative tuning changes
notes: For outdoor position-hold issues, separate RTK fix quality from attitude-control behavior.
Treat steady hover bias as possible S30 payload center-of-gravity offset before trim changes.
Use smaller PID steps than the base aircraft because payload inertia is higher.
